description.ko: 아쿠아-5는 해저의 가장 깊고 도달하기 어려운 곳을 탐사하기 위해 제작된 최첨단 자율 탐사 유닛으로, 심해의 생물 발광 현상과 그 신비로움을 밝혀냅니다.
description.en: The AQUA-5 is an advanced autonomous exploration unit built to traverse the most unreachable depths of the ocean floor, revealing the bioluminescent wonders of the abyss.

prompt: Futuristic high-tech submersible droid AQUA-5 navigating the midnight zone of the deep ocean, glowing bioluminescent sensors and teal LEDs, surrounded by giant glowing jellyfish and ancient thermal vents, hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, deep navy and electric blue color palette.
